name: Corn Flower Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Brown the chopped pork until cooked through.
2. Add water to the saucepan and bring to a simmer. Cook for 10-15 minutes.
3. Stir in the white cream corn, salt, and pepper. Continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes or until heated through.
4. Remove from heat and gently stir in the beaten egg. Serve hot.
